differential_diagnoses: Congenital pulmonary airway malformation (CPAM) with superinfection
next_steps: Contrast-enhanced CT of the chest to delineate anatomy, vascular supply, and cystic versus solid components
Pediatric surgery consultation for consideration of diagnostic biopsy or surgical resection
Diagnostic thoracentesis with pleural fluid analysis and culture
Bronchoscopy to rule out endobronchial obstruction or structural airway anomalies
Comprehensive genetic evaluation including DICER1 sequencing
Serial follow-up of urinary tract findings given known right-sided dilation
